scope: offline current-state overlay on the complete 2026-07-12 public-ecosystem ledger

refresh_policy.normal_ci: offline: validate this overlay and its baseline hash without contacting remotes
refresh_policy.network_refresh: manually verify advertised refs and repository contents, then update this dated overlay and dependent prose
refresh_policy.expiry: re-review an edge when its producer revision, consumer revision, schema, wire, model, or adapter revision changes

last_network_refresh.method: official GitHub refs plus exact-revision repository surfaces; archived baseline left immutable
last_network_refresh.conclusion: only pid-rs and NCP remain direct Prisoma edges; no reviewed sibling reached E2 with Prisoma or E4 scientific conformance

overrides.relationship: direct pinned submodule and local path dependency
overrides.current_boundary: the exact 0.9.0 post-tag review source is pinned seven commits after v0.9.0; upstream main has additional unadopted scientific-contract and exact-certifier work but states that Prisoma integration is not claimed; the pin makes no 1.x compatibility promise or registry/wheel publication promise, and its fixtures do not establish high-dimensional VLA application validity or independent corroboration

overrides.relationship: optional immutable dependency of the workspace-excluded read-only observer
overrides.current_boundary: upstream main is an unreleased, release-blocked 1.0.0-rc.1 wire-1.0 candidate that identifies Prisoma as an uncertified wire-0.8 consumer; no conforming public live producer, migration qualification, secure deployment receipt, or E4 scientific conformance report exists

overrides.relationship: candidate comparator sharing pid-rs and NCP; strict two-route consumer, lifecycle adapter, and bounded operational receiver surfaces exist upstream, but no direct Prisoma adapter
overrides.current_boundary: the public head freezes 0.9.0 candidate inputs and adds receiver-side implementation, but no reciprocal Prisoma pin, no direct Prisoma adapter, producer-consumer golden fixture, or deployed receiver-verified Crebain-to-Galadriel qualification exists; shared PID code remains one correlated implementation family

overrides.relationship: candidate producer with a public 0.9.0 research prerelease, bounded Galadriel evidence-sender component, inactive plant-contract surfaces, and a profile-neutral frame-convention corpus
overrides.current_boundary: the public prerelease supplies component and historical-fixture evidence only; a local put is not receiver receipt, reciprocal Galadriel decoding, correlation, deployed TLS/ACL, or direct Prisoma evidence; the frame corpus is not called by admission and carries no frame-instance or origin/datum/body-point proof, NCP action/control commands remain unregistered, and no direct Prisoma adapter, managed product route, or live Crebain-to-Engram loop exists

overrides.relationship: candidate difficult external adapter and transport test
overrides.current_boundary: the producer explicitly has no drop-in Prisoma adapter and documents schema, tensor, clock, frame, and statistical gaps
the public repository is README-only and says implementation will be open-sourced after publication; no executable public Engram/NCP producer exists

overrides.relationship: candidate security and authority comparator with no direct Prisoma edge
overrides.current_boundary: upstream now has substantial internal P0/durability work, an opt-in exact NCP adapter, a narrow receiver-observed synthetic mTLS/ACL campaign, an off-by-default exact-route strict-publisher binding with a broader Called-lifecycle fault matrix, and fail-closed validation of a caller-declared live startup profile, but the declaration is cooperative, process-local, bypassable through lower-level construction, and not durably bound; positive composition and result/fault evidence use test-only seams and no live Zenoh session executes the concrete method; there is no runnable service, credential-custody proof, Crebain application, immutable release, E4 report, or direct Prisoma route, and any use must remain offline/advisory unless the Agent Bridge-only control-plane decision is revised

overrides.relationship: candidate read-only visualization consumer with no direct Prisoma edge
overrides.current_boundary: the public 0.9.0 prerelease provides deterministic accessible SVG export across its 19 stable visualization families, but has no published package or DOI, external oracle or real-adapter evidence, or Prisoma contract and does not supersede Prisoma's Rerun-first decision

overrides.relationship: candidate optional reconstruction and scene-variation producer with canonical scene and Gaussian-splat GLB surfaces but no direct Prisoma edge
overrides.current_boundary: upstream has a v2 development/release-candidate line, canonical scene model, KHR_gaussian_splatting GLB reader/writer, inspection/conversion paths, and resource hardening, but no calibrated reconstruction-to-diagnostic uncertainty claim, Prisoma adapter, or E4 report; optional tool/model licenses vary
